thread: Do the Barov roads and estate stores lead to a live command-tier answer?

evidence.clue: The Barov road package points east toward private infrastructure and controlled access.
Jaina reaches the active core through Caer Darrow and Scholomance.
Chapter 13 proves the line leads all the way to Kel'Thuzad and back out with the plague answer in hand.
Chapter 13 confirms the Barov route is not only a way in but a covert way back out through the east wall and old crypt spine once the core is reached.
Jandice escaping during the ascent shows the route still leaves dangerous Barov-connected loose ends even though the access question itself is answered.

readerKnows: The route question stays resolved: Barov-country infrastructure led cleanly to Kel'Thuzad's core. What remains is fallout from who else can still use that corridor.
povCharacterKnows: Sylvanas now knows the line reaches all the way to the sanctum and back out again, but she also knows it did not end with every Barov-aligned actor pinned in place.
notes: Resolved as an access thread; chapter 13 adds extraction and loose-end consequences rather than reopening the route question.
